---
title: "Plot Japan Climate Map"
---

```{r}
library(tmap)
library(rnaturalearth)
```

日本地図を描画するには、[rnaturalearthhiresパッケージ](https://github.com/ropensci/rnaturalearthhires)が必要です。

```{r}
#renv::install("ropensci/rnaturalearthhires")
japan <- ne_states(country = "Japan", returnclass = "sf")
sf_plot <- sf_pet[!is.na(sf_pet[["PET_year"]]), ]
tm <- tm_shape(japan, crs = 4612) +
  tm_polygons(col = "gray90") +
  tm_shape(sf_plot[, "PET_year"], crs = 4612) +
  tm_symbols(
    shape = 20,
    fill = "PET_year",
    size = 0.1,
    fill_alpha = 0.9,
    fill.scale = tm_scale_continuous(
      values = "viridis"
    ),
    fill.legend = tm_legend(
      title = "PET",
      reverse = TRUE,
      position = c("right", "bottom"),
      frame = FALSE,
      bg.color = "transparent"
    )
  ) +
  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE,
    bg.color = "transparent"
  )
print(tm)
```
